meaning: n.(鮑溽噪)閭ｫ霍苓鰍,閭ｫ霍鈴ｪｨ
examples: The tibiotarsus of hindlimbs of typical terrestrial birds with the characteristic accustomed to walk and run is the longest, and its tarsometatarsus is longer than the femur;
The find includes a complete hip and four leg bones (femur, fibula, tibiotarsus and hypotarsus).
